Welcome to

Stefenos' Portfolio

I'm a server admin who builds things. Log services, small tools, automations, even site templates; as long as it runs on Linux, it's here!

View Projects

Research

Research areas

Topics I'm interesting in studying

Artificial Inteligence

Using Narrow (task-specific) AI to design systems that have a limited set of tasks focusing on improving day-to-day life.

Archival

Preserving and Organizing Digital or Physical records to ensure accessibility and usability no matter the time.

Digital Ethics / Privacy

Studying system for responsible data use, algorithmic fairness and user privacy.

Cybersecurity

Studying vulnerabilities, threat models, and defensive strategies to protect digital systems and data.

Projects

My projects

A selection of my most recent work

Dev

PostLogs

A centralized log manager that receives logs via HTTP POST requests and stores them in MariaDB. It applies category-based filtering and sends Telegram notifications for logs matching user-defined critical categories.

In progress
07/06/2026, 00:00:00 Source
View all projects →

Publications

My latest publications

Recent research and writing from me

Report

Implementing Large Language Models on Low-Power Embedded Systems

This paper presents a methodology for integrating LLMs into constrained environments, with a focus on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano. We examine optimization techniques such as 4-bit quantization and knowledge distillation, which significantly reduce memory requirements with minimal accuracy loss.

09/06/2026, 03:44:00
View all publications →
